ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName),"Physical Exam Completed"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e0b000001nOvW"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e0b000001iU5h"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e0b000001nOvl") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You Can Not Edit This Opportunity Because Physical Exam Was Completed
